name: Tnt: Crab !!
recipeIngredient: 1/2 pound capellini pasta - cooked al dente
recipeInstructions:
1. Make the panache the day before serving. Mix the julienned bell pepper, jicama, sliced onion, and finely chopped jalapeno in a bowl.
2. Squeeze the juice from the limes and orange and pour over the vegetables. Toss with a little salt and allow to marinate overnight, stirring occasionally.
3. To make the crab balls, mix the cooked capellini pasta, picked-over crab meat, finely chopped scallions, beaten eggs, grated Parmesan cheese, salt, pepper, and cayenne in a bowl. Form into 35 balls about the size of a walnut.
4. Heat oil for deep frying to 350°F (175°C).
5. Fry the crab balls in batches until golden brown, about 2-3 minutes per batch.
6. Remove from the pan with a slotted spoon and drain on paper towels. Keep warm in a 150°F (65°C) oven while completing the frying process.
7. To serve, place 4 to 6 crab balls on each plate with some of the panache next to them. Garnish with 2 avocado slices and a few sprigs of cilantro.
Note: The crab mixture can be made the day before serving and kept refrigerated, tightly covered with plastic wrap. If the balls are fried in advance or if there are leftovers, reheat them in a 400°F (200°C) oven for a few minutes to crisp.
